title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Huawei announced the Tau Scaling Law as a competitive response in the hardware race between China and the USA. The strategy leverages EUV and DUV lithography alongside packaging and logic folding techniques to advance semiconductor capabilities.
